slides.title: DesignShift
slides.subtitle: An AI-led design lifecycle for the FHL hackathon — and HatchLab, an AI idea graph.
slides.narration: This is DesignShift. An AI-led design lifecycle, built for the hackathon.

slides.title: AI can help at every design step — but the help is scattered.
slides.body: Designers juggle a dozen tools and prompts, with no single place that guides the work.
slides.narration: AI can help at every design step, but today that help is scattered across a dozen tools.

slides.title: Built for designers and makers racing through Fix, Hack, Learn.
slides.body: The people who need momentum, not more tabs.
slides.narration: It's built for designers and makers racing through Fix, Hack, and Learn.

slides.title: What if the whole design lifecycle was AI-led, in one place?
slides.body: One hub that turns good ideas into great ones.
slides.narration: So what if the whole design lifecycle was AI-led, and lived in one place?

slides.title: DesignShift: start with a task, follow an AI-led lifecycle.

visual.alt: DesignShift home — Start with a task

slides.body: Jump straight into an AI-assisted path for whatever you need.
slides.narration: DesignShift lets you start with a task and follow an AI-led lifecycle, end to end.

slides.title: An AI lab for every phase of the work.
slides.body: Pick a phase, get the right AI-assisted activities.
slides.narration: An AI lab maps every phase of the work to the right assisted activities.

slides.title: HatchLab — hatch your idea on an AI idea graph.
slides.body: Start with a challenge, explore connected possibilities, converge on one buildable idea.
slides.narration: And this is HatchLab. You start with a challenge, and hatch your idea on an AI idea graph.

slides.title: Grab-and-go prompts to pressure-test every idea.
slides.body: Bash bugs, crit designs, and script your demo.
slides.narration: Grab-and-go prompts help you pressure-test ideas, bash bugs, and crit designs.

slides.title: From scattered AI tips to one AI-led design hub.
slides.narration: It turns scattered AI tips into one design hub, and it's only getting deeper.

slides.title: Launch DesignShift. Hatch your next idea.
slides.body: Fix. Hack. Learn — with AI in the loop.
slides.narration: So launch DesignShift, and hatch your next idea.
